title: Produce v0.5.0 release gap analysis and implementation plan

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Plan: Read-only gap analysis of v0.5.0 design spec against codebase. Exploring knowledge.rs edit command, kickoff.rs subcommands/prompt builder, TUI mod.rs/issues_tab/knowledge_tab, repo root structure, and main.rs CLI structure. Will produce .kickoff-plan.json with gaps, assumptions, subtasks, and conflicts.

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Observation: Three PRs already merged on origin/develop: #294 (CLI restructure, REQ-9), #295 (kickoff agent init/sync, REQ-6), #296 (TUI view state + scroll clamping, REQ-4/REQ-5). These satisfy REQ-4, REQ-5, REQ-6, and REQ-9. Remaining: REQ-1 (knowledge section edits), REQ-2 (kickoff list), REQ-3 (TUI sync), REQ-7 (branch protection), REQ-8 (repo cleanup), REQ-10 (version bump).

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Result: Gap analysis complete. Revised against origin/develop which has PRs #294, #295, #296 merged. 4 of 10 REQs already implemented. Remaining work: REQ-1 (knowledge section edits, blocking), REQ-2 (kickoff list, blocking), REQ-3 (TUI sync, blocking), REQ-7 (branch protection, advisory), REQ-8 (repo cleanup, advisory), REQ-10 (version bump, advisory). 19 subtasks estimated. 4 conflicts identified. Output in .kickoff-plan.json.
